summary: Iteration 10: All 6 new power features tested successfully. Backend: 23/23 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All new features working - Share, Export, Versions, Activity buttons visible and functional. SharedProjectPage displays public projects correctly with read-only Monaco editor. Prompt Templates (8 templates) display correctly when chat is empty.

issues: Clipboard write triggers browser permission error (NotAllowedError) - expected behavior in test environment without clipboard permissions

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/projects/:id/share toggles sharing and returns share_id + share_url
Backend: GET /api/shared/:shareId returns public project data (no auth needed)
Backend: GET /api/shared/:shareId increments view_count
Backend: GET /api/shared/invalid returns 404
Backend: GET /api/projects/:id/messages returns conversation history
Backend: POST /api/projects/:id/messages saves a message
Backend: DELETE /api/projects/:id/messages clears messages
Backend: GET /api/prompt-templates returns 8 prompt templates with correct structure
Backend: GET /api/projects/:id/export returns ZIP file with correct Content-Type and Content-Disposition
Backend: Export empty project returns 400
Backend: GET /api/projects/:id/activity returns activity timeline
Backend: Activity is logged on share toggle
Backend: POST /api/projects/:id/snapshots creates a version snapshot
Backend: GET /api/projects/:id/snapshots lists snapshots
Backend: POST /api/projects/:id/snapshots/:snapId/restore restores project files
Backend: Invalid snapshot restore returns 404
Backend: AI generate endpoint works (returns 200 or 402 for insufficient credits)
Backend: SSE endpoint requires token param (401 without)
Backend: Login endpoint works
Backend: Plans endpoint works
Frontend: SharedProjectPage shows project name, owner, view count, files, Monaco editor (read-only)
Frontend: SharedProjectPage has 'Try CursorCode AI' CTA button
Frontend: SharedProjectPage has 'Share' button to copy link
Frontend: Invalid share link shows 'Project Not Found' with 'Go Home' button
Frontend: ProjectPage has Share, Export, Versions, Activity buttons in header
Frontend: ProjectPage shows Prompt Templates (8) when 'Browse Prompt Templates' clicked
Frontend: Prompt templates include: SaaS, E-Commerce, Dashboard, Chat, Blog, CRM, API, Portfolio
Frontend: Share button toggles between 'Share' and 'Shared' styling
Regression: Landing page loads correctly with CursorCode AI branding
Regression: Login works with test credentials
Regression: Dashboard shows projects and Credit Meter
critical_code_review_comments: Share feature correctly toggles is_public and generates unique share_id (12 chars)
Shared page increments view_count on each access (good for analytics)
Shared page excludes _docs/ files (internal agent docs) from public view
Prompt templates are hardcoded (8 templates) - consider DB for user templates later
Export generates proper ZIP with README.md included
Snapshots auto-save current state before restore (safety feature)
All new collections: project_messages, project_activities, project_snapshots

test_credentials.note: Test project is now PUBLIC with share_id: GbTYLEW8Kdaocrcx

seed_data_creation: Test project 'Test AI Project' used from previous iterations. Now has share_id GbTYLEW8Kdaocrcx and is_public=true.
context_for_next_testing_agent: 6 new features fully tested: 1) Share Project - POST /api/projects/:id/share toggles is_public, returns share_id. 2) SharedProjectPage at /shared/:shareId shows read-only view with Monaco editor, owner, views, CTA. 3) Conversation History - messages persisted per project in project_messages collection. 4) Prompt Templates - 8 hardcoded templates (saas, ecommerce, dashboard, chat, blog, crm, api, portfolio). 5) Export - GET /api/projects/:id/export returns ZIP. 6) Activity Timeline - all actions logged. 7) Snapshots - create/list/restore with auto-save before restore. Test user ai_test@example.com has project 'Test AI Project' with share_id GbTYLEW8Kdaocrcx publicly accessible.
mocked_apis_note: No mocked APIs. All features use real MongoDB collections and FastAPI endpoints.
